{
  "plan": "# Tetragon Data Leak Protection with Demo Scenario\n\n## Architecture\n\nTwo layers of protection applied to a new &#96;coder-secure&#96; namespace:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nflowchart TD\n  subgraph coderSecure [\"coder-secure namespace\"]\n    WorkspacePod[\"Workspace Pod\"]\n  end\n\n  subgraph layer1 [\"Layer 1: Cilium Network Policy\"]\n    CiliumPolicy[\"CiliumNetworkPolicy\\ndefault-deny egress\\nallow: DNS + cluster internal\"]\n  end\n\n  subgraph layer2 [\"Layer 2: Tetragon Enforcement\"]\n    EgressBlock[\"enforce-egress-block\\ntcp_connect to external IP → Sigkill\"]\n    SensitiveRead[\"enforce-sensitive-read\\nread /etc/shadow, K8s secrets → Sigkill\"]\n  end\n\n  WorkspacePod --&gt;|\"curl external\"| CiliumPolicy --&gt;|DROPPED| ExternalIP[\"External IP\"]\n  WorkspacePod --&gt;|\"tcp_connect external\"| EgressBlock --&gt;|SIGKILL| ExternalIP\n  WorkspacePod --&gt;|\"cat /etc/shadow\"| SensitiveRead --&gt;|SIGKILL| Blocked[\"Blocked\"]\n  WorkspacePod --&gt;|\"cluster-internal traffic\"| AllowedTraffic[\"Coder API, DNS ✓\"]\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## What gets created\n\n### 1. Tetragon enforcement policy: block external egress\n\nFile: &#96;roles/tetragon/files/policy-enforce-egress-block.yml&#96;\n\nA &#96;TracingPolicyNamespaced&#96; that hooks &#96;tcp_connect&#96; and kills any process attempting a TCP connection to an IP outside the cluster:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\napiVersion: cilium.io/v1alpha1\nkind: TracingPolicyNamespaced\nmetadata:\n  name: enforce-egress-block\nspec:\n  kprobes:\n    - call: \"tcp_connect\"\n      syscall: false\n      args:\n        - index: 0\n          type: \"sock\"\n      selectors:\n        - matchArgs:\n            - index: 0\n              operator: \"NotDAddr\"\n              values:\n                - \"127.0.0.1\"\n                - \"10.42.0.0/16\"   # cluster_cidr\n                - \"10.43.0.0/16\"   # service_cidr\n                - \"172.26.122.221\" # WSL2 node IP (for Coder agent)\n          matchActions:\n            - action: Sigkill\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThis is the official Tetragon pattern from their [enforcement quickstart](https://github.com/cilium/tetragon/blob/main/examples/quickstart/network_egress_cluster_enforce.yaml). The &#96;NotDAddr&#96; operator means: \"if the destination address is NOT one of these values, trigger Sigkill\".\n\n### 2. Tetragon enforcement policy: block sensitive file access\n\nFile: &#96;roles/tetragon/files/policy-enforce-sensitive-read.yml&#96;\n\nA &#96;TracingPolicyNamespaced&#96; that kills processes opening sensitive files:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\napiVersion: cilium.io/v1alpha1\nkind: TracingPolicyNamespaced\nmetadata:\n  name: enforce-sensitive-read\nspec:\n  kprobes:\n    - call: \"security_file_open\"\n      syscall: false\n      args:\n        - index: 0\n          type: \"file\"\n      selectors:\n        - matchArgs:\n            - index: 0\n              operator: \"Prefix\"\n              values:\n                - \"/etc/shadow\"\n                - \"/etc/gshadow\"\n                - \"/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io\"\n                - \"/var/lib/rancher\"\n                - \"/etc/rancher\"\n                - \"/root/.kube\"\n          matchActions:\n            - action: Sigkill\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 3. CiliumNetworkPolicy: defense-in-depth\n\nFile: &#96;roles/tetragon/files/cilium-netpol-deny-egress.yml&#96;\n\nNetwork-level default deny egress, allowing only DNS and cluster-internal traffic:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\napiVersion: \"cilium.io/v2\"\nkind: CiliumNetworkPolicy\nmetadata:\n  name: deny-external-egress\nspec:\n  endpointSelector:\n    matchLabels:\n      app.kubernetes.io/name: coder-workspace\n  egress:\n    - toEndpoints:\n        - matchLabels:\n            \"k8s:io.kubernetes.pod.namespace\": kube-system\n            \"k8s:k8s-app\": kube-dns\n      toPorts:\n        - ports:\n            - port: \"53\"\n              protocol: ANY\n    - toCIDR:\n        - \"10.42.0.0/16\"\n        - \"10.43.0.0/16\"\n        - \"172.26.122.221/32\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 4. Ansible integration\n\nUpdate [roles/tetragon/tasks/main.yml](roles/tetragon/tasks/main.yml) to:\n- Create the &#96;coder-secure&#96; namespace\n- Apply enforcement policies to &#96;coder-secure&#96;\n- Apply the CiliumNetworkPolicy to &#96;coder-secure&#96;\n- Keep existing monitoring-only policies in &#96;coder&#96;\n\nUpdate [group_vars/all.yml](group_vars/all.yml) to add &#96;tetragon_secure_namespace: coder-secure&#96;.\n\n### 5. Coder template for secure workspaces\n\nCreate &#96;templates/podman-workspace-secure/&#96; as a copy of the existing template with:\n- &#96;namespace&#96; variable defaulting to &#96;coder-secure&#96;\n- Same Podman-in-pod configuration\n- Same persistent storage\n\n### 6. Demo simulation script\n\nFile: &#96;scripts/demo-dataleakage.sh&#96;\n\nA script that runs inside the workspace (or via &#96;kubectl exec&#96;) demonstrating:\n\n| Test | Expected result |\n|---|---|\n| &#96;curl https://example.com&#96; | Process killed (Sigkill) |\n| &#96;python -c \"import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('https://example.com')\"&#96; | Process killed |\n| &#96;cat /etc/shadow&#96; | Process killed |\n| &#96;cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token&#96; | Process killed |\n| &#96;curl http://coder-server.coder.svc:3000&#96; | Allowed (cluster-internal) |\n\nThe script will print clear PASS/FAIL for each scenario.\n\n## Key design decisions\n\n- **Separate namespace** (&#96;coder-secure&#96;): the existing &#96;coder&#96; namespace keeps monitoring-only policies so regular workspaces remain unrestricted. Secure workspaces go into &#96;coder-secure&#96;.\n- **Two enforcement layers**: Tetragon (kernel-level, kills the process) + Cilium (network-level, drops packets). Defense-in-depth.\n- **Node IP whitelisted**: &#96;172.26.122.221&#96; is allowed so the Coder agent can reach the Coder server via NodePort.\n- **No package installs possible** in secure workspaces: &#96;pip install&#96;, &#96;apt update&#96; will fail since they require external network. This is by design for a high-security workspace.\n",
  "name": "Tetragon data leak protection",
